Package org.eventb.core.tests.versions

Class TestEventBVersion_004_M_002_C_001_P

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.versions.EventBVersionTest
org.eventb.core.tests.versions.TestEventBVersion_004_M_002_C_001_P
public class TestEventBVersion_004_M_002_C_001_P extends EventBVersionTest
Version 4 of machine and version 2 of context database take mathematical language version 2 in formula attributes.
